equipment_rentals.name: Mahindra Arjun 555 DI Tractor
equipment_rentals.description: 50 HP high-performing heavy tractor, ideal for land preparation, rotavator, and deep seed bed ploughing. Maintained nicely with brand new rear tires.

equipment_rentals.name: John Deere 5050D Power Tractor
equipment_rentals.description: Reliable dual-clutch 50 HP power tractor. Comes complete with power steering, dual speed PTO and high oil brakes. Very fuel efficient.

equipment_rentals.name: Swaraj Pro-700 Combine Harvester
equipment_rentals.description: Heavy duty wheat and paddy crop combine harvester. Comes with skilled driver operator included. Highly efficient grain thresher minimal wastage.

equipment_rentals.name: Kartar 4000 Premium Rice Harvester
equipment_rentals.description: Continuous tracked harvester designed specifically for moist rice & paddy fields to avoid sinking. Extremely fast harvest turnaround.

equipment_rentals.name: Shaktiman Rotary Tiller (Rotavator)
equipment_rentals.description: 7-feet dynamic rotary tiller for perfect dry/wet soil preparation. Pulverizes soil in a single run, reducing fuel consumption.

equipment_rentals.name: Pneumatic Precision Seed Sower
equipment_rentals.description: Modern automatic seed drill for equal row spacing and depth. Best for sowing wheat, corn and mustard seed. Drastically improves germination.

community_reports.incident_description: Early-stage Yellow Rust warning. Light dusting seen on wheat leaf blades along boundary fields. Farmers should monitor their soil moisture levels closely and apply propiconazole 25% EC if needed.
Severe unseasonal hailstones damaged flowering mustard and vegetable fields in Karnal subdistrict. Keep records of land geo-tag photos for disaster crop claims.
Direct grain procurement price for fine paddy grains jumped. Private mills in Amritsar offering ₹2,380 per quintal, which is higher than MSP. High demand!
Late Blight observed in potato crops across neighboring tracks. High relative humidity is driving infestation. Recommended to spray Mancozeb immediately.
